meta.regression_guard: Image-only MCP-canonical content array. Previously this tool returned a flat top-level `data` field on `result` — clients still reading `result.data` get undefined and silently fail. The new shape is `result.content[0] = {type:"image", data:<base64>, mimeType:"image/png"}`. A text content item appearing alongside the image would push our shared MCP client into the JSON/text fallback path (the image-only branch only fires when `textParts.length === 0`), and the image base64 would be discarded. Image-only is the contract.

arguments.image_id: <UUID extracted from generate_shot artifacts[0].uri trailing segment>
